title: Snaplook
description: This mod allows you to hold a key to go into third person mode much like features seen in clients such as Lunar or Feather.
body:
Allows you to snap in and out of third person mode with a single key
much like the snaplook module found in Lunar and Feather client.

**Default KeyBind: Left-Alt** (changeable in in Key Binds menu)
![snaplook bind can be changed within the keybinds menu ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66cbb642651a6ecf6abfd50313a49a2ca38016c7_0.webp)

**in version 1.21.8 and lower the Snaplook keybind is under its own category.**

Requires fabric loader 0.18.3 or higher
